Name: Boer Goat
Description: South Africa's flagship meat goat breed with strong Eastern Cape roots and wide production use inland and in the north.
Location: EC, FS, NC, NW, LP, KZN

Name: Kalahari Red
Description: A red-coated meat goat adapted to hot, dry grazing conditions in inland provinces.

Name: Savanna Goat
Description: A hardy commercial meat goat commonly linked to bushveld and warmer summer-rainfall zones.

Name: Angora Goat
Description: The mohair breed most strongly concentrated in the Eastern Cape and nearby Karoo-linked production belts.
